parameters.command:
='claude -p "You are the service-upgrade agent. Read /home/wizard/code/infra/.claude/agents/service-upgrade.md for full instructions.

Upgrade task:
- Image: ' + $json.body.diun_entry_image + '
- New tag: ' + $json.body.diun_entry_imagetag + '
- Hub link: ' + ($json.body.diun_entry_hublink || 'none') + '

Execute the upgrade workflow now."'
